Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 86 

015 = Medical or other remedial care or services, other than physicians' services, provided by licensed 
practitioners within the scope of practice as defined under State law 
016 = Home health services — nursing services 
017 = Home health services — home health aide services 
018 = Home health services — medical supplies, equipment, and appliances suitable for use
